title: Kimco Realty Corporation (KIM) CEO Conor Flynn on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Kimco Realty Corporation. (NYSE:KIM ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 28, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants David Bujnicki - Head of Investor Relations Conor Flynn - Chief Executive Officer Glenn Cohen - Chief Financial Officer Ross Cooper - President and Chief Investment Officer David Jamieson - Chief Operating Officer Kathleen Thayer - Vice President of Corporate Accounting Conference Call Participants Craig Schmidt - Bank of America Gregory McGinnis - Scotia Bank Richard Hill - Morgan Stanley Juan Sanabria - BMO Capital Markets Samir Khanal - Evercore ISI Alexander Goldfarb - Piper Sandler Michael Bilerman - Citi Anthony Powell - Barclays Derek Johnston - Deutsche Bank Haendel St. Juste - Mizuho Caitlin Burrows - Goldman Sachs Michael Mueller - JPMorgan Ki Bin Kim - Truist Securities Floris Van Dijkum - Compass Point Linda Tsai - Jeffries Christopher Lucas - Capital One Security Paulina Rojas - Green Street Operator Greetings and welcome to Kimco Realty Corporation's First Quarter 2022 Earnings Call.

title: Kimco's (KIM) Q1 FFO & Revenues Beat Estimates, Stock Down
text: Kimco (KIM) reports better-than-expected results in the first quarter on higher occupancy and rent growth.

title: Kimco Realty (KIM) Q1 FFO and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Kimco Realty (KIM) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 5.41% and 1.19%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Kimco Realty® Announces First Quarter 2022 Results
text: JERICHO, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Kimco Realty® (NYSE: KIM), North America's largest publicly traded owner and operator of open-air, grocery-anchored shopping centers, including mixed-use assets, today reported results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2022. For the three months ended March 31, 2022 and 2021, Kimco Realty's net income available to the company's common shareholders was $0.37 per diluted share and $0.30 per diluted share, respectively. title: Kimco Realty® Declares and Raises Dividends on Common Stock and Declares Class L and Class M Preferred Stock Dividends
text: JERICHO, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Kimco Realty® (NYSE: KIM), North America's largest publicly traded owner and operator of open-air, grocery-anchored shopping centers, including mixed-use assets, today announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per common share, representing a 5.3% increase from the prior quarterly dividend. The quarterly cash dividend on common shares, which is based on projected REIT taxable income, is payable on June 23, 2022 to sharehold

title: Kimco Realty: 3.1% Yield And Potential For Dividend Growth
text: Kimco Realty's portfolio occupancy continues to recover. Net operating income is rising.
